All samples now show per-EP download progress with name and percentage,
matching the pattern already in native-chat-completions samples.

**Changes (38 files across 4 languages):**
- **C# (9 samples)**: Replaced bare \DownloadAndRegisterEpsAsync()\ and
\RunWithSpinner\ calls with progress callback
- **JS/TS (12 samples)**: Replaced bare \downloadAndRegisterEps()\ with
progress callback
- **Python (9 samples)**: Replaced bare \download_and_register_eps()\
with progress callback
- **Rust (8 samples)**: Replaced \download_and_register_eps(None)\ with
\download_and_register_eps_with_progress\

progress line showing EP name (left-aligned 30 chars) and download
percentage.

fix: include groups in HMAC viewer tokens for dashboard SAR (#25)

* fix: include groups in HMAC viewer tokens for dashboard SAR

The dashboard SubjectAccessReview was checking only the user identity
without groups, causing 401 errors for users whose permissions come
from group-based ClusterRoleBindings (e.g., AKS masterclient gets
cluster-admin via the system:masters group).

Changes:
- Add Groups field to authn.Claims
- IssueViewerToken now accepts and embeds groups from X-Remote-Group
- Dashboard authorizer passes groups to SubjectAccessReview
- Dashboard command exits with error if token request fails

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: only set GOEXPERIMENT=nosystemcrypto for Microsoft Go

The Makefile plugin build was unconditionally setting
GOEXPERIMENT=nosystemcrypto, which fails on upstream Go (doesn't
recognize the experiment). Now it detects Microsoft Go via
'go version' output and only sets the experiment when needed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: revert to direct push for CHANGELOG release updates

Revert the PR-based CHANGELOG approach to direct push. The repository
ruleset now has OrganizationAdmin bypass, allowing github-actions[bot]
to push directly to main during releases.

The PR approach failed because GITHUB_TOKEN lacks pull-requests:write
permission for creating PRs via the GitHub API.

commit.message:
fix(envoy): remove invalid max_requests_per_connection from http2_protocol_options

max_requests_per_connection is a cluster-side field (CommonHttpProtocolOptions),
not a valid field in HttpConnectionManager.http2_protocol_options. Envoy
rejects the config at startup → crash-loop → all connections get RST with
"connection preface" error (both direct and ICE paths).

Remaining http2_protocol_options fields are all valid:
- connection_keepalive (interval/timeout)
- initial_stream_window_size
- initial_connection_window_size

fix: equity updates immediately after trade close; fix collapse buttons for HA CSP

Issue 1 – Equity not updating on win/loss:

  falling back to any non-null symbol if the active one has none yet.

  buttons (CSP 'script-src: self' blocks inline event handlers in HA).

  btn-collapse-chart via addEventListener in DOMContentLoaded.

Sync trading-bot addon with main app (app.py, bot.py, database.py,
frontend/app.js, frontend/index.html, frontend/style.css in both
backend/ and trading-bot/backend/).

Tests: 233 passed (added 17 new tests covering paper/real equity update,
collapse button HTML/JS wiring, and equity API endpoint correctness).

The _schemasDiscovering boolean allowed concurrent callers to both pass
the guard before either set it to true, causing duplicate mcpList() calls
and interleaved config mutations. Replace with a cached promise so
concurrent callers await the same in-flight discovery.

* feat: add lifecycle management across core infrastructure

Add dispose/cleanup paths to prevent memory leaks and enable proper
resource teardown:

- WorkerManager: add terminateWorker(), dispose(), Symbol.asyncDispose
- WorkerServerBase: lower completedRequests safety cap from 10k to 1k
- EventEmitter: add setMaxListeners() warning, listenerCount(), eventNames()
- Container/ServiceRegistry: add dispose() with Symbol.asyncDispose support
- KnowledgeBase: add Symbol.dispose/asyncDispose, deregisterKnowledgeBase()

- WorkerManager: deregister state before terminating worker, catch
  termination errors so cleanup is always reliable

  collect errors during iteration and clear maps in finally block,
  throw AggregateError if any service disposal failed
- EventEmitter.setMaxListeners(): validate input is finite and
  non-negative, throw RangeError on invalid values
- EventEmitter: reset warnedEvents when listener count drops below
  limit in off() and after once-listener removal in emit()
- KnowledgeBaseRegistry: remove from persistent repo before live map
  to avoid inconsistent state on failure

commit.message:
Add failing regression tests for mapper.rs defects

Three tests that reproduce bugs found during code review:

- negative_frequency_is_rejected: negative FREQ parses to Some(0)
  instead of None
- negative_nanos_does_not_corrupt_date: negative nanos in Timestamp
  silently produces epoch date in ADIF export
- non_ascii_date_does_not_panic: non-ASCII 8-byte date string panics
  on str slice char boundary check

All three tests fail against the current code, confirming the bugs.
Fixes will follow in a separate commit.

Also adds Bug Fix Protocol (tests-first) to the code-testing-agent
skill so this workflow is followed for all future bug fixes.
